name: First Aid
overview: First aid—caring for injured or ill persons until they can receive professional medical care—is an important skill for every Scout. With some knowledge of first aid, a Scout can provide immediate care and help to someone who is hurt or who becomes ill. First aid can help prevent infection and serious loss of blood. It could even save a limb or a life.

requirements.text: Handling a First Aid Emergency. Do the following:

content.value: Do the following:

sub_requirements.label: a
sub_requirements.text: Explain the steps necessary to assess and handle a first aid emergency, including a safety evaluation of the scene.

content.value: Explain the steps necessary to assess and handle a first aid emergency, including a safety evaluation of the scene.

resources.title: The 3 C's of First Aid: Check, Call, Care (website)

sub_requirements.label: b
sub_requirements.text: Tell how you would obtain emergency medical assistance from your home and from a remote location on a wilderness camping trip.

content.value: Tell how you would obtain emergency medical assistance from your home and from a remote location on a wilderness camping trip.

resources.title: What to Say When You Call 911 (video)
Preparing for a Medical Emergency at Home (website)
Calling for Help for a Wilderness Emergency (website)

sub_requirements.label: c
sub_requirements.text: Demonstrate the precautions you must take to reduce the risk of transmitting an infection between you and the victim while administering first aid, including the safe disposal of used first aid supplies.

content.value: Demonstrate the precautions you must take to reduce the risk of transmitting an infection between you and the victim while administering first aid, including the safe disposal of used first aid supplies.

resources.title: Using Personal Protective Equipment in First Aid (video)

sub_requirements.label: f
sub_requirements.text: Discuss why shock is an emergency.

content.value: Discuss why shock is an emergency.

sub_requirements.label: g

sub_requirements.text: Obtain a copy of the Scout Annual Health and Medical Record and discuss the importance of the form including information on immunizations, allergies, medications, health history, and medical examinations to providing first aid at Scouting events.

content.value: Obtain a copy of the Scout Annual Health and Medical Record and discuss the importance of the form including information on immunizations, allergies, medications, health history, and medical examinations to providing first aid at Scouting events.

content.value: Assemble a personal first-aid kit for hiking and backpacking. Demonstrate the proper use of each item in your first-aid kit to your counselor.

requirements.text: With guidance from your counselor, develop a plan to teach a first-aid skill or topic using the EDGE method. Discuss your skill, topic, and plan with your counselor, and then teach your skill or topic to your family or to one or more Scouts.

content.value: With guidance from your counselor, develop a plan to teach a first-aid skill or topic using the EDGE method. Discuss your skill, topic, and plan with your counselor, and then teach your skill or topic to your family or to one or more Scouts.

resources.title: The Teaching EDGE: The best way to teach someone a new skill (website)

content.value: Do ONE of the following:

sub_requirements.label: a
sub_requirements.text: Visit an emergency medical station house or training center in person. From the medical first responders that you meet during your visit, learn about how they serve their community and about their careers. Discuss with your counselor what you learned during your tour and interviews.

content.value: Visit an emergency medical station house or training center in person. From the medical first responders that you meet during your visit, learn about how they serve their community and about their careers. Discuss with your counselor what you learned during your tour and interviews.

sub_requirements.label: b
sub_requirements.text: Interview an emergency medical services professional about their work. Learn about how they chose this career and about their duties. Discuss what you learned with your counselor and whether you might be interested in this career.

content.value: Interview an emergency medical services professional about their work. Learn about how they chose this career and about their duties. Discuss what you learned with your counselor and whether you might be interested in this career.

resources.title: Female EMS Helicopter Pilot: A Day in a Life (video)

sub_requirements.label: c
sub_requirements.text: Identify three career opportunities that would use skills and knowledge in emergency medical services. Pick one and research the training, education, certification requirements, experience, and expenses associated with entering the field. Research the prospects for employment, starting salary, advancement opportunities, and career goals associated with this career. Discuss what you learned with your counselor and whether you might be interested in this career.

content.value: Identify three career opportunities that would use skills and knowledge in emergency medical services. Pick one and research the training, education, certification requirements, experience, and expenses associated with entering the field. Research the prospects for employment, starting salary, advancement opportunities, and career goals associated with this career. Discuss what you learned with your counselor and whether you might be interested in this career.

resources.title: 5 Careers that Require CPR & First Aid Certification (video)

sub_requirements.label: d
sub_requirements.text: Identify how you might use the skills and knowledge in the field of emergency medical services to pursue a personal hobby and/or healthy lifestyle. Research the additional training required, expenses, and affiliation with organizations that would help you maximize the enjoyment and benefit you might gain from it. Discuss what you learned with your counselor and share what short-term and long-term goals you might have if you pursued this.

content.value: Identify how you might use the skills and knowledge in the field of emergency medical services to pursue a personal hobby and/or healthy lifestyle. Research the additional training required, expenses, and affiliation with organizations that would help you maximize the enjoyment and benefit you might gain from it. Discuss what you learned with your counselor and share what short-term and long-term goals you might have if you pursued this.
